title: Ability to connect board columns for subitem connections

posts.author: MortenN (Morten Nielsen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,

It would be great if it was possible to combine connections that connect to subitems in different boards. Similarly to how we can combine “normal” connections in one column.

This would work wonders, if you could support more than the single connection to a subitem board in such column. Thank you!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @MortenN!

Just to clarify, you’re requesting the ability to connect to multiple subitems across boards in the one connect board columns - is this correct?

posts.author: MortenN (Morten Nielsen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes exactly
So board_1 can contain the connection to “subitems_of_board_2” and “subitems_of_board_3” in one column.

posts.author: tmsirvent (Tara)
posts.cookedHtml: Has there been any solution to this scenario/request?
